allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add complete Students module with CRUD functionality

- Database: Add Gender enum and update Student model with gender field
- Database: Make phone field unique for students
- Database: Add 6 test students via seed script
- API: Implement full CRUD endpoints for students module
  * GET /api/students - List all students with search and filters
  * POST /api/students - Create new student
  * GET /api/students/[id] - Get single student details
  * PUT /api/students/[id] - Update student information
  * DELETE /api/students/[id] - Archive or delete student
- Frontend: Build complete students page with Ant Design components
  * Table component with pagination and sorting
  * Search functionality \(name, phone, email\)
  * Filters \(status, gender\)
  * Modal form for add/edit with validation
  * Error handling and loading states
- Dependencies: Add Ant Design and dayjs packages

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add authentication middleware and JWT token management

- Implement root middleware for route protection and token validation
  - Public routes: /, /login, /register
  - Protected routes: /dashboard/*, /admin/*, /teacher/*, /student/*
  - Role-based access control \(SUPER_ADMIN, ADMIN, TEACHER, STUDENT\)
  - Auto-redirect to login when unauthorized

- Create API authentication middleware system
  - withAuth\(\) - Authentication middleware for API routes
  - withRole\(\) - Role-based authorization middleware
  - withAuthAndRole\(\) - Combined auth and role checking
  - Helper functions: getUser\(\), isAdmin\(\), isSuperAdmin\(\)
  - Token extraction from Authorization header, cookies, and middleware headers

- Add client-side authentication utilities
  - saveToken\(\) - Save token to cookie and localStorage
  - saveUser\(\) - Save user data to localStorage
  - getToken\(\) - Retrieve token from cookie or localStorage
  - logout\(\) - Clear all auth data \(cookies and localStorage\)
  - isAuthenticated\(\) - Check authentication status

- Update API routes with middleware protection
  - Students API \(GET, POST, PUT, DELETE\) now use withAuth
  - Automatic user context injection via getUser\(\)
  - Consistent 401/403 error responses

- Enhance login/logout functionality
  - Login now saves token to cookie \(7-day expiry\)
  - Support for redirect parameter after login
  - Logout clears both cookie and localStorage
  - Auto-redirect logged-in users from login page

- Add comprehensive documentation
  - API_MIDDLEWARE_README.md with usage examples
  - api-middleware.example.ts with real-world scenarios
  - TypeScript interfaces for type safety

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
